tags.name: Glendora Ridge Road
tags.note: Blocked by gate at Mount Baldy Road, only accessible by fire vehicles or NPS vehicles. Although it has only one lane, this road is not a one-way road. Oneway = no is used to reflect this. Please don't tag as "closed" or "construction" for temporary closu
